overview.description: The Hartford Strategic Income ETF (HFSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides broad exposure to debt securities from around the world, including emerging markets. HFSI was launched on Sep 21, 2021 and is issued by The Hartford.
